name: Marincess Pascalus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海晶乙女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マリンセス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>パスカルス
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Marincess" monster from your hand in Defense Position, except "Marincess Pascalus". During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Marincess" Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Marincess Pascalus" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Marincess" monster from your hand in Defense Position, except "Marincess Pascalus". During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Marincess" Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Marincess Pascalus" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 "Marincess" monster from your hand in Defense Position, except "Marincess Pascalus". During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Marincess" Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Marincess Pascalus" once per turn.
